fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the fill path was successfully computed; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the filled path geometry.

fields.summary: Computes the filled geometry of the source path using the current paint settings and writes the result into the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the fill path was successfully computed; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the filled path geometry.
params.matrix: The transformation matrix to apply when computing the fill path.

fields.summary: Computes the filled geometry of the source path using the current paint settings and the specified transformation matrix, and writes the result into the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the fill path was successfully computed; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the filled path geometry.
params.cullRect: The rectangle used to cull portions of the path that fall outside its bounds.

fields.summary: Computes the filled geometry of the source path using the current paint settings, culled to the specified rectangle, and writes the result into the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the fill path was successfully computed; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the filled path geometry.
params.resScale: The resolution scale factor used to determine the precision of curves in the fill path.

fields.summary: Computes the filled geometry of the source path using the current paint settings at the specified resolution scale, and writes the result into the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the fill path was successfully computed; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
